title: Chicken Lettuce Wraps II
instructions:
Heat the oil in a large saucepan and add the ground chicken; cook until browned. Make sure to crumble the meat as it cooks. Drain.
Add the chicken back to the pan and add the garlic, onion, hoisin, soy sauce, rice wine vinegar, ginger and Sriracha. Cook until the onions are translucent.
Stir in the water chestnuts and green onions; cook for another minute or 2. Season with the salt and pepper to taste and serve with the Bibb lettuce and enjoy!
